questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: 3 persons A, B and C are sitting along the corners of a triangular table. A is to right of B. Who is sitting to right of C?

solutions.solution: (b) Clearly, Ali is on Champa's right. So, statement (b) is correct.
(d) If looked in an anti-clockwise manner, Sita, Ram, Champa, Ali and Niti are seated between Tilak and Farookh.
(d) Clearly, Ali, Champa and Ram are close neighbours.
(c) B and C are not facing centre.
(d) T is sitting third to the left or right of B.
(c) V is fourth to the right of C.
(d) The persons who are not facing centre i.e., B and C are sitting together.
(d) Clearly, A is second to the left of U.
(b) Arrangement according to the question is as follows. Clearly, B is sitting to the right of C.
